190             rows = self._conn.execute(  # nosec B608 - interpolated value is _TERMINAL_EVENTS literal tuple.
191                 f"""
192                 SELECT task_id,
193                        node_id,
194                        event_type   AS last_event,
195                        timestamp_utc AS last_ts
196                 FROM   timeline_events t1
197                 WHERE  event_id = (
198                            SELECT MAX(event_id) FROM timeline_events t2
199                            WHERE t2.task_id = t1.task_id
200                        )
201                 AND    event_type NOT IN ({terminal_list})
202                 ORDER  BY last_ts DESC
203                 """
204             ).fetchall()
results.issue_text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.
